channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fed's Warsh stays mum on rate plans, pledges price stability
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh told Congress on Tuesday the central bank is committed to reducing inflation, but gave little guidance...

item.title: Trump urges Netanyahu to withdraw Israeli forces from Syria and Lebanon
item.description: During a phone call on Thursday, President Trump told Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu that Israel should begin redeploying its troops from Syria and...

item.title: Democrats conflicted over House vote to block aid to Israel
item.description: An upcoming House vote on a measure to halt U.S. aid to Israel is causing division among Democrats, who are uncertain how to express their discontent...

item.title: Supreme Court warns of rising threats and calls for increased security
item.description: Justice Elena Kagan told Congress on Tuesday that police anticipate a nearly 40% increase in threats against Supreme Court justices this year, highlig...
